title: Setting Up Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA / TOTP)
text:
Q: How do I set up multi-factor authentication (MFA) using TOTP?
A: Step 1: Download a TOTP authenticator app on your mobile device. Recommended apps include Google Authenticator, Authy, or Microsoft Authenticator. Step 2: Log in to your company account on your computer. Step 3: Navigate to the security settings, usually found under 'Account Settings' or 'Security'. Step 4: Look for the option to enable Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) or Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) and select it. Step 5: You will be presented with a QR code. Step 6: Open the authenticator app on your mobile device and select 'Add Account' or the '+' icon, then choose 'Scan QR Code'. Step 7: Point your device's camera at the QR code displayed on your computer screen. Step 8: The app will generate a 6-digit code. Enter this code back into the MFA setup page on your computer to verify. Step 9: Save your settings. Step 10: For added security, consider saving backup codes provided during the setup process in a secure location. Step 11: Log out and then log back in to test that MFA is working correctly.
